summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Phase-1 Trading Engine Optimization. Verified all 4 admin endpoints (GET/PUT/RESET engine-config, cooldowns, filter-stats, symbol-metrics) via HTTP, admin login → full UI flow on /app/admin/engine-config across all 5 tabs, persistence/cache-invalidation verified via reload, and non-admin redirect protection. 29/29 pytest tests pass (12 new e2e + 17 regression).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/engine-config wraps payload as {config, defaults} — frontend correctly unpacks via apiGet<{config: EngineConfig}>; tests updated to match envelope. Worth documenting this contract in the route docstring.

Non-admin redirect uses client-side <Navigate to='/app' replace />; backend enforcement via get_current_admin dependency confirmed (401 to unauthenticated and any non-admin caller). Defense-in-depth is correctly implemented.
server.py is 3377 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting admin routes (engine-config block ~2693-2820) into a separate module for maintainability. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created one ephemeral TEST_nonadmin_<ts>@test.com signup to verify redirect; can be cleaned later via TEST_ prefix filter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase-1 admin endpoints + EngineConfig UI verified end-to-end. Use /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_admin_e2e.py as regression suite. Important contract: GET/PUT /api/admin/engine-config return {config: {...}, defaults: {...}} (not flat config). Tests reset min_score to defaults (80) at end. XAUUSD override min_score=85 is correctly seeded. Non-admin signup auto-creates user with non-admin role; redirect kicks in via client Navigate.
verified_flows: GET /api/admin/engine-config → {config, defaults} with all 15 Phase-1 keys
PUT /api/admin/engine-config {min_score: 82} → returns updated config; GET reflects 82 (cache invalidates)
Unauthenticated to all 4 admin endpoints → 401/403 (6 tests)
UI: /app/admin/engine-config renders engine-config-page with 5 tabs (SCORE, COOLDOWN, FILTERS, PER-SYMBOL, TELEMETRY)
UI SCORE tab: min-score edit 80→83, save-scoring fires PUT, reload persists value=83; all 7 score-weight-* inputs present
UI COOLDOWN tab: cd-losses, cd-min, cd-refresh, save-cooldown all visible & cd-refresh click works
UI FILTERS tab: sess-asia-start/end/metals-block, bias-enabled, bias-neutral-mode, bias-penalty, atr-min, atr-max, save-filters all wired
UI PER-SYMBOL tab: sym-XAUUSD-min-score shows 85 (override default); save-symbols present
UI TELEMETRY tab: telemetry-days input + telemetry-refresh button work; loads filter-stats + symbol-metrics
UI reset-defaults button: min-score returns to 80
Non-admin signup → navigation to /app/admin/engine-config → redirected to /app (Dashboard); engine-config-page not visible; ENGINE nav link hidden in AppShell
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Initial test failures were due to test assertions assuming flat-config response shape; corrected to match actual {config, defaults} envelope contract.
